title: Nutrition International - Invitation to Bid for Youth Service Centers Construction and Renovation
description: Nutrition International-Tanzania invites bids from interested and eligible firms for the renovation and construction of youth service centers at health centers, dispensaries, and district hospitals in Tabora Region, Tanzania.
eligibility: Interested and eligible firms. Documents (Architectural Drawings, BoQ, ToR) requested by email to procurementtanzania@nutritionintl.org
